    • Define scope
    • Set milestones
    • Assign tasks
  • Design phase
    • Create wireframes
      • Homepage layout
      • Dashboard layout
    • Design mockups
      • Color palette approved
      • Typography chosen
  • Development
    • Set up repository
      • Initialize project
      • Configure CI/CD
      • Add code owners
    • Implement features
      • User authentication
      • Payment integration
